---
pagetitle: "Gallery"
lightbox:
  match: auto
  effect: zoom
  desc-position: bottom
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

# December 2024

::::::::::::::: columns
::: {.column width="30%"}
![In love with Tapas.](../img/202412-01.jpeg){group="2024-12"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![It is what I needed to hear - thanks!](../img/202412-02.jpeg){group="2024-12"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![First time attending a conference - thanks Craig for the opportunity!](../img/202412-03.jpeg){group="2024-12"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Treasure hunting in a charity shop.](../img/202412-04.jpeg){group="2024-12"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![One of my favourite books I've read in 2024.](../img/202412-05.jpeg){group="2024-12"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Glad that I met you before the end of 2024!](../img/202412-06.jpeg){group="2024-12"}
:::
:::::::::::::::

# November 2024

::::::::::::::: columns
::: {.column width="30%"}
![One of the gorgeous libraries at KCL.](../img/202411-01.jpeg){group="2024-11"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Rare to see such lovely weather in London!](../img/202411-02.jpeg){group="2024-11"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Night at UCL.](../img/202411-03.jpeg){group="2024-11"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Hotpot!](../img/202411-04.jpeg){group="2024-11"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Attending a discussion about AI and reproducibility at LSE.](../img/202411-05.jpeg){group="2024-11"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![In love with Turkish cuisine!](../img/202411-06.jpeg){group="2024-11"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Attending a seminar about Behavioural Finance at LSE.](../img/202411-07.jpeg){group="2024-11"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Back on campus :)](../img/202411-08.jpeg){group="2024-11"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![First time trying Morroccan cuisine - thanks Eve!](../img/202411-09.jpeg){group="2024-11"}
:::
:::::::::::::::

# October 2024

::::::::::::::: columns
::: {.column width="30%"}
![Irresistible...](../img/202410-01.jpeg){group="2024-10"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![007.](../img/202410-02.jpeg){group="2024-10"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Primrose Hill](../img/202410-03.jpeg){group="2024-10"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Chicken Xiao Long Bao!](../img/202410-04.jpeg){group="2024-10"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Super Full Moon I.](../img/202410-05.jpeg){group="2024-10"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![What a lovely sunset!](../img/202410-06.jpeg){group="2024-10"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Super Full Moon II.](../img/202410-07.jpeg){group="2024-10"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![St Paul's Cathedral.](../img/202410-08.jpeg){group="2024-10"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Thank God I'm here.](../img/202410-09.jpeg){group="2024-10"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Eve Cafe.](../img/202410-10.jpeg){group="2024-10"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Home.](../img/202410-11.jpeg){group="2024-10"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Daunt Books Marylebone](../img/202410-12.jpeg){group="2024-10"}
:::
:::::::::::::::

# September 2024

::::::::::: columns
::: {.column width="30%"}
![Being a petsitter :) - an unforgettable experience!](../img/202409-01.jpeg){group="2024-09"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![What a breathtaking sunset...](../img/202409-02.jpeg){group="2024-09"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![This is the advice I need right now.](../img/202409-03.jpeg){group="2024-09"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Happy Mid-Autumn Festival! A lovely full moon!](../img/202409-04.jpeg){group="2024-09"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Fascinating book to read. What he taught is not only applicable for personal finance but other aspects in life as well.](../img/202409-05.jpeg){group="2024-09"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Feeling so lucky to see this majestic performance in Warner Brothers Harry Potter Studio!!!](../img/202409-06.jpeg){group="2024-09"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Once-in-a-lifetime event! Thanks Eve for this valuable opportunity!!!](../img/202409-07.jpeg){group="2024-09"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Reminds me of a cover from the book The Body Keeps The Score.](../img/202409-08.jpeg){group="2024-09"}
:::
:::::::::::

# August 2024

::::::::::::: columns
::: {.column width="30%"}
![Gonna miss this KFC.](../img/202408-01.jpeg){group="2024-08"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![A lovely gift for a friend's birthday](../img/202408-02.jpeg){group="2024-08"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![What a wonderful meal!](../img/202408-03.jpeg){group="2024-08"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![A great illustration of two attachment styles from Anxiously Attached.](../img/202408-04.jpeg){group="2024-08"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Tick Tock, Tick Tock...](../img/202408-05.jpeg){group="2024-08"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Last sunset in Coventry.](../img/202408-06.jpeg){group="2024-08"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Can't believe this beach inside London!](../img/202408-07.jpeg){group="2024-08"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![A lovely sunset in Ealing.](../img/202408-08.jpeg){group="2024-08"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
!['When I stare at the darkness, so does the darkness.'](../img/202408-09.jpeg){group="2024-08"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Big Ben.](../img/202408-10.jpeg){group="2024-08"}
:::
:::::::::::::

# July 2024

::::::::::::::: colunmns
::: {.column width="30%"}
![How to deal with hot weather in London... with gelato!](../img/202407-01.jpeg){group="2024-07"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Lucky day!](../img/202407-02.jpeg){group="2024-07"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
!["What are you looking at?"](../img/202407-03.jpeg){group="2024-07"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Absolutely breathtaking - reminds me of Harry Potter...](../img/202407-04.jpeg){group="2024-07"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Lovely wall inside an Asian restaurant in Oxford.](../img/202407-05.jpeg){group="2024-07"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Congrats to all graduates!](../img/202407-06.jpeg){group="2024-07"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Finally it's summer time!](../img/202407-07.jpeg){group="2024-07"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Full moon.](../img/202407-08.jpeg){group="2024-07"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![On the move!](../img/202407-09.jpeg){group="2024-07"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Time for a rest.](../img/202407-10.jpeg){group="2024-07"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Glad that my friend and I met a peacock in Kyoto Garden!](../img/202407-11.jpeg){group="2024-07"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![What a view in Holland Park, London!](../img/202407-12.jpeg){group="2024-07"}
:::
:::::::::::::::

# June 2024

::::::::::::: colunmns
::: {.column width="30%"}
![How to deal with hot weather...](../img/202406-01.jpeg){group="2024-06"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Summer is coming!](../img/202406-02.jpeg){group="2024-06"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Meowjesty \<3](../img/202406-03.jpeg){group="2024-06"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Absolutely breathtaking.](../img/202406-04.jpeg){group="2024-06"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Yum Cha!](../img/202406-05.jpeg){group="2024-06"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Picnic at St. James Park, London](../img/202406-06.jpeg){group="2024-06"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Hats off to these lovely flowers that grows in difficult places.](../img/202406-07.jpeg){group="2024-06"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![In love with Sunday morning workout!](../img/202406-08.jpeg){group="2024-06"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Soon.](../img/202406-09.jpeg){group="2024-06"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Let's call it a day, shall we?](../img/202406-10.mp4){group="2024-06"}
:::
:::::::::::::

# May 2024

::::::::::: colunmns
::: {.column width="30%"}
![Gas Street Basin, Birmingham](../img/202405-01.jpeg){group="2024-05"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![A lovely sunset!](../img/202405-02.jpeg){group="2024-05"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Flat White from Beans and Leaf Coffee House, Coventry](../img/202405-03.jpeg){group="2024-05"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Happy when attending this exhibition! One of my favorite anime of all time](../img/202405-04.jpeg){group="2024-05"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Victoria Harbour, Hong Kong](../img/202405-05.jpeg){group="2024-05"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Mong Kok, Hong Kong](../img/202405-06.jpeg){group="2024-05"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Missing this hot and sunny weather!](../img/202405-07.jpeg){group="2024-05"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Mid-Levels (Central, Hong Kong)](../img/202405-08.jpeg){group="2024-05"}
:::
:::::::::::

# April 2024

:::::::: colunmns
::: {.column width="30%"}
![Latte from Beans and Leaf Coffee House, Coventry](../img/202404-01.jpeg){group="2024-04"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![View at Gas Street Basin, Birmingham](../img/202404-02.jpeg){group="2024-04"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![(Almost) full moon :)](../img/202404-03.jpeg){group="2024-04"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Night View of Warwick Business School Building](../img/202404-04.jpeg){group="2024-04"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![The weather is getting better - taken at University of Warwick](../img/202404-05.jpeg){group="2024-04"}
:::
::::::::
